command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_hermes4.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent

# Install as system service
sudo /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway install --system --run-as-user jose --force 2>&1
echo install_exit=0
sleep 3

# Check result
sudo systemctl status hermes-gateway 2>/dev/null | head -12
ls /etc/systemd/system/hermes* 2>/dev/null
ss -tlnp | grep 9119 || echo port_9119_not_open_yet
SHEOF
bash /tmp/fix_hermes4.sh"
